scope: Discord connection settings, Channels inbox, Agent runtime, and graceful lifecycle
resolved_findings: Authenticated shutdown uses an independent client/task; ambiguous ACK loss waits beyond the Agent watchdog before force/reap.
Security-tightening binding changes revoke authority before manifest publication; additive changes drain first and rollback remains fail-closed.
Linux process enumeration skips inaccessible unrelated PIDs while the owned lease PID remains fail-closed.
Accepted reservations survive hard-timeout restart as durable partial records; owner rotation fences stale generations.
PID/token lock ownership, startup-only dead-owner repair, latest-state merge, and exact predecessor CAS prevent stale overwrite and duplicate chunk claims.
external_acceptance_pending: Credentialed live Discord receive/reply, reconnect, permission-loss, and token rotation.
Real operating-system credential prompt and credential-store lifecycle.
